textByHash.b2282c7dc0043312d5c97d5f9be3a804833303de: Beyond this wall you'll find the Kebos Lowlands. Most of the region is lizardman territory. We're here to keep them from entering Kourend.
textByHash.25c94fcb6deb6f8aa94aa45386733ca849f7f9ca: We used to keep this passage properly barricaded shut, but then the fancy historians from the Arceuus Library wanted to go do some research out there.
textByHash.c69987f0bb4a31afa0b7bd616dd8cc071f3bc714: Soon the farmers joined them, and before you knew it, everyone wanted to go explore. Some of them have even started living out there.
textByHash.ed769db56cb96d984105604a807a796d668ad0d9: I can see it all ending badly, but that's the problem with intellectuals - they always think they know better.
textByHash.e2132050a9c99a694c44c6b9074a6a3401ec00be: Anyway, maybe they'll all get themselves killed. Then we can put the barricade back up.
textByHash.901a99544e1efc58cb452c255276ea5af86ae269: If you go out there yourself, give the lizardmen a kicking from me. They've killed too many of my soldiers.
textByHash.115e96b75673dd1f2ddaa67a2002b6082a42ed40: Beyond these walls is a Lizardman settlement, we're defending against it.
textByHash.b47de08211884c361dfa0796467cb342b2bba9c4: Who knows, all I know is offence is the best type of defence, we will attack soon, will you help us, brave warrior?
textByHash.63b70eea82d0f573c013ebcd477e3b0e8a4011c4: Oh, the assault is not for a while, go train and prepare, for there will be all sorts of grand rewards from this expedition.
